end of world model.

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current nodes with children:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['children']:
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = [c for c in seg['nodes'] if c['id']==child_id][0]
            print(f"  Node {n['id']} (color={n['color']}) has child {child_id} (color={child['color']}, pixels={child['pixels']}, boundary={child['boundary']})")

# Try DOWN
action(['DOWN'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter DOWN:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['children']:
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = [c for c in seg['nodes'] if c['id']==child_id][0]
            print(f"  Node {n['id']} (color={n['color']}) has child {child_id} (color={child['color']}, pixels={child['pixels']}, boundary={child['boundary']})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
